dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.daysRemaining: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} remaining
dashboard.noAlerts: No alerts for your visa type
dashboard.canceledNotice: Your plan is canceled and will expire on {date}. You'll keep Pro access until then.

checklist.expired: Your visa has expired. Consult an immigration attorney immediately.
checklist.expiry30: Your visa expires in less than 30 days. Take action now.
checklist.expiry90: Your visa expires in less than 90 days. Start your renewal process.
checklist.expiry180: Consider starting your renewal paperwork soon (visa expires in ~6 months).
checklist.h1b1: Keep I-797 approval notice in a safe place
checklist.h1b2: Verify your employer is maintaining your H-1B status
checklist.h1b3: Track your 6-year H-1B limit and plan for extensions or green card
checklist.h1bVb: Check the monthly Visa Bulletin for your priority date progress
checklist.f1m1: Maintain full-time enrollment to keep F-1 status
checklist.f1m2: Apply for OPT/CPT before your program end date
checklist.f1m3: Keep your I-20 updated with your DSO
checklist.family1: Gather supporting documents (proof of relationship, financial affidavit)
checklist.family2: Check Visa Bulletin for your priority date category
checklist.gc1: Maintain your permanent resident status (don't travel abroad for 6+ months without re-entry permit)
checklist.gc2: Renew your green card (Form I-90) before it expires
checklist.gc3: Consider applying for naturalization if eligible (5 years as LPR, or 3 years if married to US citizen)
checklist.other: Update your visa type in settings for personalized action items

hero.headline: Navigate U.S. Immigration — In Your Language
hero.subheadline: AI-powered immigration assistant that answers 80% of your questions instantly. For the complex 20%, we connect you with vetted attorneys.

features.title: Everything You Need to Navigate Immigration
features.subtitle: Everything you need to navigate your immigration journey with confidence.

aiAssistant.title: AI Immigration Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Ask questions in your language and get instant answers grounded in official USCIS sources. Available 24/7 whenever you need help.
aiAssistant.mockQuestion: When should I apply for my H-1B extension?
aiAssistant.mockAnswer: You should file 6 months before expiry. Your visa expires on June 15, so start your petition by December 15...

dashboard.title: Case Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track your visa status, important deadlines, and get personalized action items based on your unique situation.

attorneys.title: Attorney Network
attorneys.description: When it gets complex, we connect you with vetted immigration lawyers who speak your language and understand your needs.
